tasks.instruction: Add a new task called Review benchmark notes and verify it appears in the task list.
Mark the task Draft Stagehand checklist as completed and verify the summary shows 1 of 2 tasks done.
Switch to the Active filter and verify the completed task Draft Stagehand checklist is no longer visible.
Edit the existing task Plan todo benchmark so it reads Plan todo benchmark outline and verify the updated text is visible.
Create a new task called Remove benchmark draft, delete it, and verify it is no longer visible in the task list.
